techniques.description: As a bonus action, you shield yourself in a bubble of frozen time for 1 minute. You have resistance to all damage and cannot be moved against your will. However, your speed is reduced by 20 feet while the bubble is active.

techniques.name: Chronicle Strike
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you mark a creature within 60 feet. For 1 minute, once per round when that creature takes damage, you can add an additional 3d10 force damage to the blow by pulling the accumulated time-energy of its own past strikes back against it.

techniques.name: Yesterday's Shield
techniques.description: As a reaction to a creature within 30 feet dropping to 0 HP, you rewind time for that creature, restoring it to the HP it had at the start of its previous turn. Once per creature per combat.

techniques.name: Age of Ruin
techniques.description: As an action, you age everything in a 30-foot radius around you 100 years in an instant. Constructs and objects are destroyed or heavily corroded. Creatures must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 4d10 necrotic damage from accelerated aging. On a success, half damage.

techniques.name: Time Avatar
techniques.description: You take on the form of a time-warped being for 1 minute. You take two turns in each round of combat. If you are reduced to 0 hit points, you rewind to 1 hit point instead (this occurs once).

techniques.name: Absolute Temporal Freeze
techniques.description: As an action, you freeze a single creature within 60 feet in time. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute (repeated saves at the end of each of its turns). While frozen, it is immune to all damage — but it also cannot act, move, or be affected by anything.

techniques.name: Causal Erasure
techniques.description: As an action, you erase a round of time for a creature within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have its last turn retroactively erased: all effects it caused on its previous turn are undone (damage dealt is restored, spells are returned unexpended, movement is reversed).

techniques.name: Mass Rewind
techniques.description: As an action, you rewind all creatures within 60 feet of you to their states 1 round ago. All creatures return to their previous HP (if lower, it is restored; if higher, it stays), their positions at that time, and all conditions acquired during that round are erased. Wisdom saving throw allows creatures to resist returning to their positions.

techniques.name: Temporal Reckoning
techniques.description: As an action, you collapse past, present, and future onto a single creature within 60 feet. Every attack it has made since the start of combat is reflected back at it simultaneously. The target takes 2d6 force damage for each attack roll it has made during this combat (Wisdom saving throw halves). Maximum 20d6.

techniques.name: Temporal Dominion
techniques.description: For 1 minute, you become the master of time itself. You take three turns each round; all creatures and effects not of your choosing are slowed (speed halved, disadvantage on attacks and Dexterity saves); and you can instantly end any effect on yourself as a free action once per turn.

techniques.name: Chrono Collapse
techniques.description: As an action, you collapse time in a 60-foot radius, forcing all creatures to simultaneously experience every moment of their life at once. All creatures must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 8d12 psychic damage and be stunned for 1 minute (repeated saves). On a success, half damage only.

techniques.name: Time's End
techniques.description: As an action, you stop time for all creatures except yourself for 1 minute (as a true time stop, not just a 1-round version). During this minute, you can take up to 10 turns uninterrupted. You cannot deal damage directly during this time, but you can set up conditions, move creatures, position objects, and activate any other techniques or non-damaging features.

techniques.name: The Timekeeper
techniques.description: As an action, you declare a fixed point in time. For the next hour, you can, as a bonus action on any subsequent turn, reset the battlefield to this fixed point: all creatures return to their HP, positions, and conditions they had at the time of declaration. You retain all actions and charges spent since then. This can be used once per declared fixed point.

techniques.name: Undying Timeline
techniques.description: When you die, you do not. Instead, you rewind to the moment 1 minute before you died, fully restored to the HP you had at that time, with full knowledge of what happened. The timeline re-runs, but you retain your memories and may act differently. Once used, this feature cannot be used again for 7 days.

features.name: Temporal Form
features.description: When you activate your Elemental Shift, the moment around you stutters as your body phase-shifts slightly out of sync. While your Shift is active: your movement speed increases by 10 feet; the first attack roll made against you each round is made with disadvantage, as attackers briefly perceive two versions of you at slightly different points in time; once per turn, when you roll a 1 on an attack roll, you may reroll and use the new result.

subclasses.name: Voidstrider (Space Attunement)
subclasses.description: Bend space itself—teleporting across the battlefield, repositioning allies and enemies, and striking from anywhere.

shift_table.name: Phase Slip
shift_table.effect: +20 ft movement; can move through one creature's space without OA.

shift_table.name: Void Step
shift_table.effect: Bonus action: teleport 10 ft to an unoccupied space you can see.

shift_table.name: Spatial Distortion
shift_table.effect: One creature within 30 ft is teleported 10 ft in a random direction (Wisdom save negates).

shift_table.name: Anchor Point
shift_table.effect: Mark your current location; once this turn as a free action, return to marked location (as misty step).

shift_table.name: Dimensional Armor
shift_table.effect: +2 AC; once per round, negate one opportunity attack.

shift_table.name: Rift Slash
shift_table.effect: Melee attacks deal extra 1d8 force damage as you strike through space.

techniques.name: Blink Step
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you teleport up to 10 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

techniques.name: Gravity Nudge
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you manipulate gravity beneath a creature within 30 feet. It must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed 5 feet in any direction you choose.

techniques.name: Spatial Distortion
techniques.description: As a reaction when you are targeted by a ranged attack, you briefly warp space around yourself. The attack has a 50% chance to miss entirely — roll a d6; on a 4-6, the attack misses.

techniques.name: Phase Blur
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you blur your position through space. Until the start of your next turn, the first attack made against you is made with disadvantage as you exist in two places briefly.

techniques.name: Void Pull
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you create a momentary pocket of gravitational pull in a 10foot radius centered on a point within 30 feet. Each creature in the area must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pulled 5 feet toward the point.

techniques.name: Spatial Displacement
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you swap places with a willing ally within 30 feet. Both you and the ally gain +2 AC until the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: Dimensional Anchor
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you anchor a creature within 30 feet to its current position. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be unable to teleport, blink, or voluntarily leave its current 10-foot area until the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: Void Crash
techniques.description: When you teleport, you can choose to detonate the space you left behind. Creatures within 5 feet of your origin point must succeed on a Strength saving throw or take 2d6 force damage and be pushed 5 feet back.

techniques.name: Gravity Slam
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you spike gravity in a column above a creature within 30 feet. It must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be knocked prone and take 1d8 bludgeoning damage.

techniques.name: Space Fold
techniques.description: As a reaction when an ally within 60 feet is attacked, you fold space to pull them 10 feet in any direction, imposing disadvantage on the triggering attack.

techniques.name: Warping Step
techniques.description: Once per turn, when you move at least 15 feet, your next melee attack deals an extra 1d8 force damage as spatial energy tears through your target.

techniques.name: Event Horizon
techniques.description: As an action, you create a point of intense gravitational pull at a location within 60 feet. For 1 minute, all creatures within 20 feet of that point must succeed on a Strength saving throw at the start of their turns or be pulled 10 feet toward it.

techniques.name: Null Step
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you negate the spatial relationship between you and a creature within 30 feet. Until the start of your next turn, that creature cannot move away from you — any movement it attempts that would increase the distance between you fails.

techniques.name: Rend Space
techniques.description: As an action, you tear a rift in space in a 30-foot line, 5 feet wide, within 60 feet of you. Creatures in the line take 3d8 force damage and must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be launched 10 feet in a random direction.

techniques.name: Twin Blink
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you teleport up to 20 feet. You can immediately use a second bonus action to teleport again up to 20 more feet.

techniques.name: Zone of Entropy
techniques.description: You create a 10-foot radius zone within 60 feet that lasts for 1 minute. Inside this zone, creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls, and all ranged projectiles are absorbed into the void.

techniques.name: Crushing Gravity
techniques.description: As an action, you double gravity in a 20-foot-radius area within 60 feet for 1 minute. Creatures in the area have their speed halved; all jump distances are halved; and at the start of each turn in the area, they take 1d8 bludgeoning damage as gravity crushes them.

techniques.name: Void Swap
techniques.description: As an action, you swap the positions of two creatures within 60 feet of you. Each creature must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be involuntarily teleported. Unwilling creatures that fail take 2d10 force damage from the spatial trauma.

techniques.name: Compressed Space
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you compress the space around an enemy within 30 feet, making the physical world smaller around it. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained for 1 minute (repeated saves).

techniques.name: Void Step
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. You can bring along any willing creature within 5 feet, teleporting them with you.

techniques.name: Gravity Well
techniques.description: As an action, you generate a field that pulls creatures toward a point of your choosing. Creatures within 30 feet of the point must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be dragged 20 feet toward it.

techniques.name: Spatial Lock
techniques.description: As an action, you lock all spatial movement in a 30-foot radius centered on you for 1 minute. No creature other than you can teleport, become ethereal, or use any effect that moves it without walking within the zone.

techniques.name: Folding Space
techniques.description: As an action, you collapse the distance between you and a creature within 60 feet. You are instantly teleported to melee range of the target (adjacent, unoccupied space), and the target takes 3d10 force damage from the spatial rupture (Strength saving throw halves).

techniques.name: Anti-Gravity Field
techniques.description: As an action, you reverse gravity in a 20-foot-radius, 40-foot-tall area within 60 feet for 1 minute. Creatures in the area float upward to the ceiling of the reversed field. Creatures that cannot grab onto surfaces take 4d6 bludgeoning damage per turn falling upward, then down again when the effect ends.

techniques.name: Afterimage
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you split your spatial presence for 1 minute, creating 2 illusory copies of yourself that mimic your movements and exist at slightly different spatial positions. Attackers must guess which is real — they have a 1in-3 chance of targeting a copy (which vanishes when hit).

techniques.name: Void Mastery
techniques.description: For 1 minute, you gain the following abilities: you can teleport up to 30 feet as a bonus action; attacks against you automatically miss if you teleport after being targeted; and if you teleport through a creature, that creature takes 2d8 force damage.

techniques.name: Spatial Collapse
techniques.description: As an action, you collapse space itself in a 30-foot radius centered on a point within 60 feet. All creatures in the area are instantly compressed toward the center, taking 6d10 force damage and being restrained for 1 minute as space compresses around them (Strength saving throw halves damage and negates restraint).

techniques.name: Reality Tear
techniques.description: As an action, you tear a rift in reality 10 feet wide and 30 feet tall within 30 feet. For 1 minute, any creature that passes through the rift is teleported 1d4 × 10 feet in a random direction and takes 4d10 force damage. Allies can pass through safely if you designate them.

techniques.name: Pocket Universe
techniques.description: As an action, you pull a creature within 30 feet into a pocket dimension for up to 1 minute. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be removed from the battlefield entirely. At the end of each of its turns, it may repeat the save. When it returns, it appears in the nearest unoccupied space.

techniques.name: Dimensional Cascade
techniques.description: As an action, you teleport up to five times in rapid succession, each time up to 30 feet, attacking a different creature with each teleport. Make a melee attack against each creature. All attacks deal extra 2d10 force damage on a hit.

techniques.name: Void Singularity
techniques.description: As an action, you create a singularity of collapsed space at a point within 60 feet. For 1 minute, all creatures within 60 feet must succeed on a Strength saving throw at the start of their turns or be pulled 20 feet toward the singularity and take 4d12 force damage. At the singularity's center, creatures take 8d12 force damage on a failed save.

techniques.name: Space Eater
techniques.description: As an action, you instantly teleport every creature within 60 feet of you to a random unoccupied space within 60 feet of you (Charisma saving throw negates for each creature). Affected creatures also take 4d10 force damage from the spatial rupture.

techniques.name: Infinite Recursion
techniques.description: For 1 minute, whenever you are hit by an attack, you can use your reaction to retroactively un-exist at that point in space — the attack misses instead. You can use this effect a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier before the technique ends.

techniques.name: Dimension Shatter
techniques.description: As an action, you shatter the fabric of space in a 120-foot radius. All creatures take 6d12 force damage (Charisma saving throw halves). On a failed save, a creature is also pulled into a random pocket dimension for 1 round, reappearing in a random unoccupied space within 60 feet at the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: God Step
techniques.description: For 1 hour, you can teleport instantaneously to any location you have been to within the last 30 days, as though you cast Teleport. In combat, you can teleport up to 300 feet as a bonus action, without limit. Nothing can restrain your movement — spatial anchors, barriers, and locks simply do not apply to you.

features.name: Voidform
features.description: When you activate your Elemental Shift, the space around you warps — you are here and not here at the same time. While your Shift is active: opportunity attacks against you are made with disadvantage, as you flicker between spatial positions as you move; you can move through creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain (you cannot end your movement inside a solid object — if you do, you are shunted to the nearest unoccupied space and take 1d10 force damage); once per turn, when you teleport by any means, the first attack you make before end of turn deals an extra 1d6 force damage.

subclasses.name: Emberclad (Fire Attunement)
subclasses.description: Burn with the fury of elemental fire—incinerating enemies, igniting the battlefield, and forging yourself in the heat of combat.

shift_table.name: Flame Step
shift_table.effect: +10 ft movement; trail of fire left behind (1d4 fire damage to creatures entering spaces you left).

shift_table.name: Heat Aura
shift_table.effect: Creatures within 5 ft take 1d4 fire damage at start of their turn.

shift_table.name: Ember Shield
shift_table.effect: Resistance to fire damage; next creature to hit you with melee takes 1d6 fire damage.

shift_table.name: Blazing Speed
shift_table.effect: +15 ft movement this turn; disengage as free action.

shift_table.name: Ignite
shift_table.effect: One creature within 30 ft catches fire (1d6 ongoing fire damage, Dex save to end on their turn).

shift_table.name: Inferno Strike
shift_table.effect: Melee attacks deal extra 1d10 fire damage and targets are ignited (1d4 ongoing fire damage).

techniques.name: Ember Strike
techniques.description: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can channel fire into the blow, dealing an extra 1d6 fire damage.

techniques.name: Flame Shield
techniques.description: As a reaction to taking damage from a melee attack, you release a burst of fire. The attacker takes 1d6 fire damage and must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or have disadvantage on its next attack roll.

techniques.name: Heat Wave
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you release a wave of intense heat in a 10-foot radius around you. Creatures in the area must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or have disadvantage on their next attack roll until the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: Fire Bolt
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you hurl a bolt of fire at a creature within 60 feet. Make a ranged spell attack (Wisdom modifier + proficiency bonus). On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage and, if flammable, it catches fire for 1 round (1d4 damage at the start of its next turn).

techniques.name: Smoke Screen
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you release a thick cloud of smoke in a 10-foot radius centered on a point within 30 feet. The area is heavily obscured until the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: Scorching Dash
techniques.description: When you Dash, fire trails in your wake. Creatures you pass within 5 feet of must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 fire damage and catch fire, taking 1d6 fire damage at the start of their turn for 1 minute (they can end this by using an action to extinguish the flames).

techniques.name: Ignite Weapon
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you set your weapon ablaze for 1 minute. Your attacks deal an extra 1d6 fire damage. On a critical hit, the target is also set on fire, taking 1d8 fire damage at the start of its turn until it uses an action to extinguish the flames.

techniques.name: Flame Burst
techniques.description: As an action, you release a burst of fire in a 15-foot-radius sphere centered on yourself. Each creature in the area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d6 fire damage.

techniques.name: Cinder Step
techniques.description: When you move, you leave a trail of burning cinders behind you. Each creature that moves through a space you occupied this turn takes 1d4 fire damage. The cinders last until the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: Flashpoint
techniques.description: As a reaction when a creature within 30 feet casts a spell, you disrupt their focus with a burst of fire. The caster must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or lose concentration, and take 1d8 fire damage.

techniques.name: Immolating Strike
techniques.description: As a bonus action, your weapon erupts in flame. Your next attack deals an additional 2d8 fire damage. If the target is flammable, it ignites and continues burning for 1 minute, taking 1d6 fire damage at the start of each of its turns.

techniques.name: Pillar of Flame
techniques.description: As an action, you conjure a pillar of fire 10 feet wide and 20 feet tall centered on a point within 60 feet. Creatures in the pillar must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 3d8 fire damage (half on success). The pillar persists until the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: Incendiary Strike
techniques.description: When you hit a creature with a melee attack, you can choose to cause a small explosion at the point of impact. Creatures within 5 feet of the target each take 1d8 fire damage (Dexterity saving throw halves).

techniques.name: Combustion Dash
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you ignite your body and rocket forward in a straight line up to 30 feet, leaving a trail of fire. Each creature whose space you pass through takes 2d6 fire damage (Dexterity saving throw halves).

techniques.name: Lava Skin
techniques.description: As a bonus action, your skin turns molten for 1 minute. You gain resistance to fire damage. Any creature that hits you with a melee attack or starts its turn grappling you takes 1d8 fire damage.

techniques.name: Blazing Vortex
techniques.description: You summon a vortex of fire in a 10-foot radius centered on yourself. Creatures in the area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 3d6 fire damage. This vortex lasts 1 minute or until you dismiss it as a bonus action.

techniques.name: Magma Barrage
techniques.description: As an action, you hurl globs of molten rock at up to three creatures within 60 feet. Make a ranged spell attack for each. Each hit deals 2d10 fire damage, and the target is coated in cooling magma — its speed is reduced by 10 feet and it takes 1d6 fire damage at the start of its next turn.

techniques.name: Wildfire
techniques.description: As an action, you set the ground ablaze in a 20-foot-radius area within 60 feet. The fire persists for 1 minute. Any creature that enters or starts its turn in the area takes 2d8 fire damage.

techniques.name: Infernal Roar
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you unleash a roar of fire and fury. Each creature within 20 feet must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be frightened of you for 1 minute (repeated saves at the end of each of their turns). Creatures that fail also take 2d6 fire damage.

techniques.name: Meteor Fist
techniques.description: When you hit a creature with a melee attack, you can channel the force of a falling meteor. The attack deals an extra 3d8 fire damage, and the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be launched 10 feet in a direction of your choice and knocked prone.

techniques.name: Molten Core
techniques.description: Your body radiates intense heat for 1 minute. Any creature that hits you with a melee attack takes 2d6 fire damage. If a creature grapples you, it must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 3d6 fire damage each round it maintains the grapple.

techniques.name: Phoenix Strike
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you imbue your next attack with phoenix fire. On a hit, the target takes an extra 4d10 fire damage. If the attack reduces the target to 0 hit points, it explodes — each creature within 10 feet takes 2d10 fire damage (Dexterity saving throw halves).

techniques.name: Volcanic Eruption
techniques.description: As an action, you create a volcanic eruption at a point within 60 feet. A 20-foot column of lava erupts — all creatures within 20 feet of the point must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 5d10 fire damage (half on success). The ground in the area is covered in slow-cooling lava (difficult terrain) for 1 minute.

techniques.name: Heatstroke
techniques.description: As an action, you focus intense heat on a creature within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 4d8 fire damage and become incapacitated until the end of its next turn, overwhelmed by the heat. On a success, half damage only.

techniques.name: Fire Storm
techniques.description: As an action, you conjure spinning columns of fire in a 10-foot radius, 20-foottall cylinder within 60 feet. The storm lasts until the start of your next turn. Each creature that enters or starts its turn in the area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 4d8 fire damage and catch fire.

techniques.name: Inferno Mastery
techniques.description: As an action, you unleash a devastating inferno. Release fire in a 30-foot cone. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw or take 8d8 fire damage (half on success).

techniques.name: Cataclysmic Flame
techniques.description: As an action, you release a supernova of fire in a 60-foot radius centered on you. All creatures in the area take 6d10 fire damage (Dexterity saving throw halves). On a failed save, they are also blinded until the end of their next turn.

techniques.name: Eternal Flame
techniques.description: As an action, for 1 minute your body burns with an undying fire. You are immune to fire damage, and at the start of each of your turns, you deal 2d8 fire damage to all creatures within 10 feet (no save). Whenever you attack, all creatures within 5 feet of the target take 1d8 fire damage.

techniques.name: Living Inferno
techniques.description: As an action, you meld into pure fire for 1 minute. You gain immunity to fire damage, resistance to all other damage, and can move through spaces occupied by other creatures, dealing 2d10 fire damage to each creature you pass through (Dexterity saving throw halves).

techniques.name: Sunburst
techniques.description: As an action, you release a burst of solar fire from your body in all directions. All creatures within 60 feet must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 6d8 fire damage and 6d8 radiant damage and be blinded for 1 minute. On a success, they take half damage and are not blinded.

techniques.name: Ardentor's Fury
techniques.description: As an action, you channel the legacy of the Fire Wyrm himself, releasing a torrent of fire in a 120-foot line, 10 feet wide. All creatures must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 10d12 fire damage and catch fire, taking 4d10 fire damage at the start of each of their turns for 1 minute. On a success, half damage and no burning.

techniques.name: Star Fall
techniques.description: As an action, you call down a rain of fireballs in a 60-foot radius centered on a point within 300 feet. Five fireballs fall at once: each is a 10-foot-radius sphere. You assign each fireball's position. Each creature in any fireball's area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 6d6 fire damage (half on success).

techniques.name: Magma Ascension
techniques.description: For 1 hour, you become a being of living magma. You gain immunity to fire and poison damage; resistance to all other damage; a fly speed of 60 feet (plume of fire); and your unarmed strikes deal 4d10 fire damage. Any creature within 10 feet of you at the start of your turn takes 2d10 fire damage (Constitution saving throw halves).

techniques.name: Conflagration
techniques.description: As an action, you trigger an uncontrolled firestorm in a 120-foot radius centered on you for 1 minute. At the start of each of your turns, all enemies take 3d12 fire damage (Dexterity saving throw halves). The fire spreads to all flammable surfaces and objects. Allies are immune.

techniques.name: Rebirth in Flame
techniques.description: When you are reduced to 0 hit points, you can use your reaction to trigger a dying explosion of fire. You release a 30-foot-radius burst of fire (4d12 fire damage, Dexterity saving throw halves). You are then immediately restored to half your maximum hit points as the fire replenishes you.

features.name: Cinderform
features.description: When you activate your Elemental Shift, your skin radiates heat and your body becomes the source of the fire rather than a vessel for it. While your Shift is active: you have resistance to fire damage; any creature that hits you with a melee attack or grapples you takes 1d4 fire damage; you shed dim light in a 10-foot radius.

subclasses.name: Eidolon (Soul Attunement)
subclasses.description: Command the essence of souls themselves—draining vitality, communing with the dead, and becoming a vessel for pure spiritual power.

shift_table.name: Soul Drain
shift_table.effect: On melee hit, drain 1d6 HP from target and regain that HP.

shift_table.name: Spectral Form
shift_table.effect: Resistance to non-magical weapon damage; immune to grapple and restrain.

shift_table.name: Necrotic Aura
shift_table.effect: Creatures within 10 ft have disadvantage on death saving throws.

shift_table.name: Spirit Shield
shift_table.effect: Reaction: reduce damage taken by 1d8 + Wisdom modifier.

shift_table.name: Soul Link
shift_table.effect: Link with ally within 30 ft; when either takes damage, split it between both.

shift_table.name: Death's Touch
shift_table.effect: On melee hit, target makes Constitution save or gain one level of exhaustion.

techniques.name: Soul Tap
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you reach out with spectral energy to a creature within 30 feet. Make a ranged spell attack (Wisdom modifier + proficiency bonus). On a hit, the target takes 1d6 psychic damage and you regain 1d4 hit points.

techniques.name: Spectral Shroud
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you wrap yourself in ghostly energy until the start of your next turn. You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened, and the first attack made against you before your next turn is made with disadvantage.

techniques.name: Fear Pulse
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you release a pulse of dread. Each creature within 10 feet must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be frightened of you until the end of your next turn.

techniques.name: Soul Echo
techniques.description: As a reaction when you take damage, you redirect a fragment of the pain to the attacker through a spiritual link. The attacker takes psychic damage equal to half the damage you took (Wisdom saving throw negates).

techniques.name: Ethereal Step
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you briefly phase into the ethereal plane. Until the start of your next turn, you can move through creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain (taking 1d10 force damage if you end your turn inside one).

techniques.name: Soulflame Strike
techniques.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can expend a use of Elemental Shift to ignite your weapon with ethereal fire, dealing an extra 2d8 psychic damage. This damage increases to 3d8 at 11th level and 4d8 at 17th level.

techniques.name: Life Drain
techniques.description: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can drain life energy from it. The target takes an extra 2d6 necrotic damage, and you regain hit points equal to half the necrotic damage dealt.

techniques.name: Haunt
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you surround a creature within 60 feet with ghostly presences. Until the start of your next turn, the target has disadvantage on all attack rolls and saving throws as spectral horrors distract it.

techniques.name: Spirit Grasp
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you project a ghostly hand at a creature within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be grappled by the spectral hand (escape DC = your spell save DC). The grappled target also takes 1d8 psychic damage at the start of each of its turns.

techniques.name: Soul Rend
techniques.description: As an action, you tear at a creature's soul within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 2d8 psychic damage and be unable to take bonus actions until the end of its next turn.

techniques.name: Echoing Will
techniques.description: As a reaction when an ally within 30 feet takes damage, you may absorb part of the pain. Reduce the damage taken by 1d10 + your Charisma modifier and take the same amount yourself.

techniques.name: Soul Sever
techniques.description: As an action, you attempt to cut the soul connection of a creature within 60 feet. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or lose access to all class features and spellcasting until the end of its next turn, as you temporarily sever it from its inner power.

techniques.name: Phantasmal Terror
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you send a terrifying vision directly into a creature's mind within 60 feet. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute and take 2d8 psychic damage (repeated saves at the end of each turn).

techniques.name: Spectral Duplicate
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you send a spectral copy of yourself to take your place momentarily. The next attack targeted at you automatically misses, targeting the duplicate instead. The duplicate then vanishes.

techniques.name: Spirit Ward
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you wrap an ally within 30 feet in spectral armor for 1 minute. That ally has resistance to psychic and necrotic damage, and attacks against it by undead creatures are made with disadvantage.

techniques.name: Wraith Dance
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you vanish and reappear in a flurry of ghostly movement, teleporting to an unoccupied space you can see within 60 feet and making a melee attack.

techniques.name: Soul Shatter
techniques.description: As an action, you target a creature within 60 feet and attempt to shatter its spirit. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or take 6d10 psychic damage and be stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, half damage only.

techniques.name: Ghostwalk
techniques.description: As a bonus action, for 1 minute you become partially incorporeal. You have resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage. You can move through solid objects (but not end your turn inside them) and ignore difficult terrain.

techniques.name: Possession
techniques.description: As an action, you attempt to impose your will on a creature within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be under your control until the end of its next turn, acting on your mental commands (Huge or larger creatures are immune).

techniques.name: Ethereal Anchor
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you anchor a creature within 60 feet to the material plane. For 1 minute, the target cannot teleport, become ethereal, or use planar travel of any kind. It also has disadvantage on Charisma saving throws.

techniques.name: Bound by Spirit
techniques.description: You can tether your soul to an enemy for 1 minute. While tethered, any damage the enemy deals to others is halved, but you take the other half as unavoidable damage. You may end this effect as a reaction.

techniques.name: Mass Haunt
techniques.description: As an action, you unleash a wave of spectral terror. All enemies within 60 feet must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 4d10 psychic damage and be frightened for 1 minute (repeated saves at end of each turn). On a success, half damage only.

techniques.name: Soul Feast
techniques.description: As an action, you feast on the spiritual energy of all living creatures within 30 feet. Each creature must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or take 4d8 necrotic damage. You regain hit points equal to the highest amount of damage dealt to any single target.

techniques.name: Psychic Collapse
techniques.description: As an action, you target a creature within 60 feet and collapse its mental defenses. The target must succeed on an Intelligence saving throw or take 6d8 psychic damage and have its Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma reduced by 1d4 each until it finishes a long rest. On a success, half damage only.

techniques.name: Spirit Army
techniques.description: As an action, you summon 1d4 + 1 spectral warriors that appear in unoccupied spaces within 30 feet. They act on their own turns (go at initiative 20), have AC 13, 30 HP each, and deal 2d8 necrotic damage with their attacks. They last for 1 minute.

techniques.name: Eidolon's Ascendance
techniques.description: As an action, for 1 minute, you become a spectral entity. Gain resistance to all damage except force and psychic, and advantage on all saving throws against being charmed or frightened. Additionally, enemies within 10 feet have disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws.

techniques.name: Soul Obliteration
techniques.description: As an action, you target a creature within 60 feet and attempt to unmake its soul. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or take 10d12 psychic damage and be paralyzed for 1 minute (repeated saves). If this damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, it is destroyed outright — body, soul, and all — and cannot be raised by any means short of a wish spell.

techniques.name: Realm of Shadow
techniques.description: As an action, for 1 minute you pull all creatures within 60 feet of you into a shadow realm. While in this realm, all light becomes dim light; all creatures except you have disadvantage on attack rolls; you are invisible to all enemies; and you can target any creature within the realm with your techniques without range limitations.

techniques.name: Spirit Storm
techniques.description: As an action, you release a torrent of souls you've touched. All enemies within 120 feet take 6d10 psychic damage and 6d10 necrotic damage (Charisma saving throw halves). On a failed save, they are also frightened, incapacitated, and reduced to 0 speed for 1 minute (repeated saves).

techniques.name: Death's Bargain
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you offer a dying creature (at 0 HP and stabilized or unconscious) within 30 feet a chance to serve you. It rises with half its maximum hit points as a spectral servant under your command. It acts on your turn, follows your commands, and lasts until the end of your next long rest or until reduced to 0 HP again.

features.name: Spectral Form
features.description: When you activate your Elemental Shift, your body becomes partially translucent — half here, half somewhere else entirely. While your Shift is active: you have resistance to necrotic and psychic damage; you can move through other creatures as if they were difficult terrain (you cannot end your movement inside them); creatures have disadvantage on opportunity attacks against you, as your precise location is unclear.

subclasses.name: Luminor (Light Attunement)
subclasses.description: Wield the power of pure radiance—blinding foes, healing allies with golden light, and becoming a beacon of hope in the darkest places.

shift_table.name: Radiant Aura
shift_table.effect: Bright light 10 ft, dim 10 ft more; allies in bright light gain +1d4 to attack rolls.

shift_table.name: Flash Step
shift_table.effect: Teleport 15 ft; creatures within 5 ft of destination are blinded until start of your next turn.

shift_table.name: Light Ward
shift_table.effect: +2 AC; undead and fiends within 10 ft have disadvantage on attack rolls against you.

shift_table.name: Solar Flare
shift_table.effect: Reaction when attacked: emit burst of light; attacker makes Con save or blinded until end of their turn.

shift_table.name: Healing Light
shift_table.effect: Bonus action: ally within 30 ft regains 1d8 + Wisdom mod HP.

shift_table.name: Searing Strike
shift_table.effect: Melee attacks deal extra 1d8 radiant damage; undead and fiends take 2d8 instead.

techniques.name: Radiant Bolt
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you launch a bolt of pure light at a creature within 60 feet. Make a ranged spell attack (Wisdom modifier + proficiency bonus). On a hit, the target takes 1d10 radiant damage.

techniques.name: Flash
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you release a burst of searing light in a 10-foot radius. Each creature in the area must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: Guiding Light
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you mark a creature within 60 feet with a halo of light. Until the start of your next turn, attacks against that creature are made with advantage.

techniques.name: Light Ward
techniques.description: As a reaction to being hit, you manifest a barrier of light. Reduce the triggering damage by 1d6 + Wisdom modifier.

techniques.name: Solar Step
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you leave a trail of blinding light in each space you move through this turn. Creatures that enter those spaces before the start of your next turn must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the start of their next turn.

techniques.name: Blazing Strike
techniques.description: When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can expend a use of Elemental Shift to engulf your weapon in searing light, dealing an extra 2d10 radiant damage. This damage increases to 3d10 at 11th level and 4d10 at 17th level.

techniques.name: Searing Ray
techniques.description: As an action, you fire a concentrated beam of light at a creature within 60 feet. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 2d10 radiant damage and must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

techniques.name: Reveal
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you bathe an area in magical light in a 30-foot radius centered on you. All invisible creatures in the area are revealed, and all illusions are dispelled. Creatures in the area cannot benefit from the invisible condition for 1 minute.

techniques.name: Solar Flare
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you release a burst of solar energy from your body. All creatures within 10 feet must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 2d8 radiant damage and be blinded until the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: Healing Radiance
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you channel light into a wounded ally within 20 feet, restoring 1d8 + Wisdom modifier hit points.

techniques.name: Illuminate Path
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you emit a guiding light for 1 minute. Allies within 30 feet of you have advantage on saving throws against being frightened or blinded.

techniques.name: Blinding Cascade
techniques.description: As an action, you unleash a cascade of light in a 30-foot cone. Creatures in the area must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 3d8 radiant damage and be blinded for 1 minute (repeated saves at the end of each turn). On a success, half damage only.

techniques.name: Light Prison
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you bind a creature within 60 feet in beams of solidified light. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be restrained for 1 minute (repeated saves to escape). Attacks made by the restrained creature are made with disadvantage.

techniques.name: Mass Mending Light
techniques.description: As an action, you send out pulses of healing light. All allies within 20 feet of you regain 2d6 + Wisdom modifier hit points.

techniques.name: Truth's Light
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you bathe a creature within 30 feet in magical light that compels truth. For 1 minute, the target cannot willingly speak a lie, and all Deception checks it makes are made with disadvantage.

techniques.name: Brilliant Form
techniques.description: As an action, you transform into a glowing avatar of light for 1 minute. Your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d6 radiant damage, and enemies that start their turn within 10 feet of you must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of their next turn.

techniques.name: Sunburst Strike
techniques.description: As an action, you concentrate a beam of solar energy at a creature within 60 feet. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 5d10 radiant damage and must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute and have disadvantage on all saving throws against radiant damage.

techniques.name: Light Step
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you convert your body to pure light and teleport to an unoccupied space within 60 feet that you can see. Each creature within 5 feet of your destination must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 2d8 radiant damage and be blinded until the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: Radiant Shield
techniques.description: As a reaction to being hit by an attack, you release a burst of radiant energy. The attacker takes radiant damage equal to the damage you took (Constitution saving throw halves). Any other creature within 5 feet of you also takes 1d10 radiant damage.

techniques.name: Undying Light
techniques.description: As a bonus action, you infuse an ally within 30 feet with light. For 1 minute, if that ally would be reduced to 0 hit points, they instead drop to 1 hit point and release a burst of light that blinds all enemies within 10 feet (Constitution saving throw negates) until the start of their next turn. This effect can only trigger once.

techniques.name: Solar Nova
techniques.description: As an action, you detonate a miniature sun centered on a point within 60 feet. All creatures within 30 feet take 6d10 radiant damage and must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute (repeated saves). On a success, half damage only.

techniques.name: Absolute Light
techniques.description: As an action, for 1 minute you become a being of pure luminous energy. You are immune to radiant and fire damage; all your melee attacks deal 2d10 extra radiant damage; and any undead creature that starts its turn within 15 feet of you must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 4d8 radiant damage.

techniques.name: Thousand Suns
techniques.description: As an action, you create a field of blinding light in a 60-foot radius centered on you. All creatures except you must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute and take 3d10 radiant damage. On a success, they take half damage only and are not blinded.

techniques.name: Dawn Strike
techniques.description: As an action, a beam of dawn light crashes down from above onto a 20-footradius area within 120 feet. All creatures must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 8d8 radiant damage. On a failed save, undead take double damage. On a success, half damage.

techniques.name: Purifying Radiance
techniques.description: As an action, you release a pulse of cleansing light in a 30-foot radius. All allies in the area are cured of all diseases, curses, the blinded condition, the frightened condition, and the poisoned condition. All enemies in the area take 3d8 radiant damage (Constitution saving throw halves).

techniques.name: Beacon of the Ages
techniques.description: As an action, you become a pillar of pure light for 1 minute. You rise up to 120 feet into the air and cast light in a 1-mile radius. All allies within 120 feet of you regain 2d10 hit points at the start of your turns. All enemies within 120 feet take 2d10 radiant damage at the start of your turns.

techniques.name: Apocalyptic Flash
techniques.description: As an action, you release an explosion of blinding radiance. All creatures within 120 feet take 8d10 radiant damage and 4d10 fire damage (Dexterity saving throw halves). On a failed save, they are also blinded, deafened, and stunned for 1 minute (repeated saves).

techniques.name: Eye of the Sun
techniques.description: As an action, you open a blazing eye of solar fire above the battlefield in a 200foot radius. For 1 minute, at the start of each of your turns, you designate up to five creatures. Each must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 5d10 radiant damage and be blinded until the start of your next turn.

techniques.name: True Revelation
techniques.description: As an action, you flood the world with absolute light. For 1 minute: all invisibility effects and illusions within 500 feet end; all creatures within 500 feet must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or be blinded; and you can see through any magical or mundane darkness, invisibility, or illusion within 1 mile.

techniques.name: Lightform Ascension
techniques.description: For 1 hour, you become a being of pure light. You gain immunity to radiant, fire, and necrotic damage; a fly speed of 120 feet; the ability to pass through any space large enough for light; and immunity to all conditions. Once per turn, you can deal 4d12 radiant damage to any creature you can see within 120 feet (no attack roll required — it's just light).

features.name: Radiant Form
features.description: When you activate your Elemental Shift, you become a source of light so intense it cannot be fully contained in a physical form. While your Shift is active: you shed bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet; you have resistance to radiant damage; creatures within 10 feet of you cannot benefit from the invisible condition against you or your allies.
